aiInsight: The candidate shows strong alignment with the core full-stack requirements — React and Node.js are well-evidenced across multiple projects, and a Codeforces rating of 1450 confirms solid algorithmic thinking. The main gaps are in DevOps tooling (Docker) and direct database project experience, neither of which is a blocker given the candidate's learning trajectory. Project depth is moderate — repos show working knowledge but lack production-scale complexity. Overall a solid hire for a junior-to-mid full-stack role with a short onboarding ramp.
